creator: ripley@nostromo.in-berlin.de
text:
One of the ports above installed "libtool-1.3" as a
	dependency but failed to register into the +REQUIRED_BY
	file, so I cannot tell which port it was.
	Having CVSup'ed the ports later on led to a dependency
	on "libtool-1.3.3" for some other program.
	I cannot tell which port installed the library to check
	for stability; I hope backwards compatibility is sufficient.

Fix: 

Have all install/deinstall invocations in /usr/ports logged in
	a central place.
